data.task_instructions: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one phenotype assertion candidate: the reduced brood size phenotype reported for C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants. Preserve subject, phenotype statement, organism hints, and one record_evidence span-backed evidence record. Do not resolve phenotype ontology IDs in the extractor.

evidence_preview.entity: reduced brood size in mus-81(tm1937) mutants
evidence_preview.subsection: Loss of mus-81 does not result in obvious meiotic defects
evidence_preview.verified_quote: mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005)

run_finished.response:

- **Subject**: mus-81(tm1937) mutants
- **Phenotype Statement**: Reduced brood size
- **Organism Hints**: C. elegans (NCBITaxon:6239)
- **Record Evidence Verified Quote**: "mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005)"

This extraction captures the key details about the reduced brood size phenotype in C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants.

trial.title: Joint Molecule Resolution Requires the Redundant Activities of MUS-81 and XPF-1 during Caenorhabditis elegans Meiosis
